commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 26. "He shall call me, Thou art My Father, and the lifter up of My salvation" (ver. 26).

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Father. We never find that David used this title; (Du Hamel) but Christ did frequently, insomuch that the Jews were convinced, that he claimed the divine nature: though, as man, he called God his support. (Berthier) (Isaias lxiii. 16.)
